programme.title: Lockup: Santa Rosa: Extended Stay
programme.desc: The prison takes on a military style feel for both the inmates and the officers; a gang unit investigation turns up the heat on a pair of cellmates, before one of them turns on the other.

programme.title: Lockup: Santa Rosa: Extended Stay
programme.desc: An inmate takes drastic action and leaves his cell in a bloody mess; dangerous contraband is found on another inmate at Florida's Santa Rosa Correctional Institution.

programme.title: Lockup: Santa Rosa: Extended Stay
programme.desc: A new arrival to the Santa Rosa Correctional Institution raises serious concerns throughout the maximum-security prison; young correctional officer cadets experience the burn as each one takes a pepper spray shot in the eye.

programme.title: Lockup: Santa Rosa: Extended Stay
programme.desc: A massive search for contraband throughout the facility turns up the heat on two inmates inside the Santa Rosa Correctional Institution; a convict prompts an evacuation when he floods his housing unit.

programme.title: Lockup: Wabash: Extended Stay
programme.desc: Wabash Valley Correctional Facility houses some of the highest security prisoners in the state; corrections staff investigate a potential escape plot and one inmate with a very familiar face tells their own story.

programme.title: Lockup: San Quentin: Extended Stay
programme.desc: As the oldest prison in California, San Quentin is steeped in a violent history, so it has a set of regulations and procedures to maintain order; inmates often operate under a different code of conduct; gangs control "prison politics."

programme.title: Lockup: San Quentin: Extended Stay
programme.desc: Boredom reigns supreme for prisoners who spend endless hours, days and months confined to their cells; some have devised creative ways to pass the time; one inmate is creating a wall mural, but not with real art supplies.

programme.title: Lockup: San Quentin: Extended Stay

programme.title: Lockup: New Mexico: Extended Stay

programme.title: Lockup: New Mexico: Extended Stay
programme.desc: A low-level offender increases his sentence from 18 months to 16-and-a-half years after three separate counts of aggravated battery on an officer; the same inmate was banned from even non-contact visits after an affair with a prison staff nurse.

programme.title: Lockup: New Mexico: Extended Stay
programme.desc: The Penitentiary of New Mexico houses both low level and max-security inmates; Level 6 inmates like Chris Shiverdecker, who has a Macgyver-like prison reputation, are still eligible for hearings that could change custody level and security status.

programme.desc: Intent on bringing justice to Lieutenant Gormley after he is beaten by a mob outside his home, Danny and Frank enlist the aid of Detective Anthony Abetemarco, who has a personal connection to the neighborhood where the attack occurred.

programme.desc: Danny and Baez investigate the death of an elderly woman who was shot in her home by a stray bullet. Also, Frank faces ridicule from his department when he disciplines a disrespectful cop, and Erin steps in to help her detective, Anthony.

programme.desc: Erin and Anthony try to prevent the deportation of a prominent community activist, Coryna Garza (Judy Reyes), who isn't a citizen, and Frank must decide if the NYPD will participate in the U.S. Marshals' high-profile raid of a local gang.

programme.title: Blue Bloods

programme.desc: Frank is left with minimal information to find a missing boy when a conflicted priest who could help won't break the seal of confession.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: Los agentes de la UAC prueban su suerte en Atlantic City, cuando el equipo es llamado para investigar una serie de asesinatos ritualistas relacionados con el casino.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: El NCIS investiga a la cabo de la Marina Laney Alimonte (Camryn Grimes) después de que la evidencia sugiere que asesinó a su vecina mientras un hipnoterapeuta la trataba por insomnio.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: El hijo de un suboficial es encontrado asesinado en su fiesta de “bienvenida a casa desde la prisión”. Las evidencias indican que el mejor amigo de toda la vida de Kasie, Dante Brown (Devale Ellis), es el sospechoso.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: Mientras investigan el asesinato de un infante de marina, el equipo de NCIS descubre un laberinto de cámaras espías que transmiten en vivo, escondidas en las habitaciones de un motel de Virginia.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: El equipo de NCIS investiga el asesinato de un músico de la banda más elitista de la Armada que actúa en eventos diplomáticos en todo el mundo.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): Amor perdido
programme.desc: Erin se enfrenta en la corte a su exesposo, Jack (Peter Hermann), quien está defendiendo al hombre que ella intenta condenar por asesinato. Mientras tanto, Danny y Baez investigan para determinar si el esposo está detrás del asesinato de su esposa.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): Ni rendición, ni retirada
programme.desc: Después de que Reggie Wilson (Cyrus Farmer), un testigo en un caso anterior de Erin, le pide ayuda para desmantelar una operación de drogas en su edificio de apartamentos, ella se propone hacer que el edificio sea seguro para su familia.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): Interferencia extranjera
programme.desc: Danny y Baez se unen con dos agentes rusos para buscar a un peligroso hombre ruso que ingresó a EE. UU. con una visa diplomática.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): La delgada línea azul
programme.desc: Cuando Danny intercepta un envío de varios millones de dólares que estaba destinado a un cártel de drogas en México, se convierte en un blanco cuando ellos regresan en busca de venganza.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: Los agentes de la UAC prueban su suerte en Atlantic City, cuando el equipo es llamado para investigar una serie de asesinatos ritualistas relacionados con el casino.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: El equipo se dirige a las playas de California tras la aparición de varios cadáveres en torres de salvamento en la costa. Deberán averiguar que tienen los cuerpos en común y quién ha podido hacerlo. Por otro lado, Hotch invita a Beth a salir.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: La UAC investiga una serie de brutales robos y asesinatos en hogares de Inland Empire, en California. Al parecer, se trata de ataques relacionados con bandas callejeras, pero la investigación pronto arroja una motivación aún más siniestra.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: El equipo viaja a Atlanta para investigar el asesinato de una mujer, descubriendo que el criminal no trabaja solo.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: El equipo de NCIS investiga el asesinato de un músico de la banda más elitista de la Armada que actúa en eventos diplomáticos en todo el mundo.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: During a traffic stop, a driver drops off his passenger before speeding away. Deputies are amazed when a man offers them an ID that looks nothing like him. Deputies investigate a case of road rage involving a gun.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A wanted man flees from Deputies with the hood up on a pickup truck. A suspect bails from a stolen truck and pretends he wasn't driving. A drunk driver is caught after a hit-and-run at a dance hall.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A biker with a history of stealing vehicles doesn’t know how to drive his motorcycle. A man in- between jobs takes up a sketchy method of earning money. Deputies strongly question the legitimacy of a man’s work van.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Police help a man evacuate a house fire, a high-speed chase yields only minor infractions, and an officer interrogates a parolee with meth in his car.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers conduct a sting using a decoy vehicle. A man with a knife flees the scene of a dispute with his baby mama. Deputies are dispatched when a man is assaulted with a shovel over twenty dollars.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: An intoxicated teen is found passed out in the surf late at night. Deputies find trespassers in a hot tub. A floating wallet is returned. The Marine Unit rescues a family thrown from jet skis.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Police arrest a suspect for armed robbery. A six foot alligator is found on a homeowner's back porch. An Officer assists in an undercover sting.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A wanted felon attempts to outrun the deputies, undercover officers conduct a sting in an area known for prostitution, and a domestic dispute between cousins goes too far.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A wanted man attempts to hide at his grandmother's house, police arrest a suspect driving a stolen vehicle, and officers call animal control for an injured dog.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A high speed vehicular pursuit results in a foot chase. Officers respond to a domestic call involving the residence's girlfriend and her children who destroyed the man's house. Police respond to a domestic violence call.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers respond to a call reporting an officer involved in a fight. A brazen female driver careens into a ditch after failing to yield. A berserk woman is pulled over for her erratic driving, she is eventually handcuffed but not without a fight.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A distinctive tattoo reveals a wanted felon’s true identity. Deputies talk to a young woman who traded one bad habit for another. A man in possession of a stolen vehicle tells officers how his day went from bad to worse.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers wrestle with a familiar nuisance to shop owners, a man's lucky dollar lets him down during a traffic stop, and too much whiskey leads to a domestic disturbance call.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A man weaves a stolen motorbike through traffic at high speeds as he tries to evade police. Deputies examine the aftermath of a violent domestic argument. A mom and dad deny that their habits could affect their child.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A soft-spoken cyclist finds a way to shock deputies. A family man remorsefully agrees with police that his COVID-19 fears led him to make a mistake. Officers investigate a car they spot swerving on the road.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A repeat offender takes the police on a bumpy ride, a deputy finds paraphernalia in a teen's car, and a woman learns of her brother's drug habit during a traffic stop.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A vehicle is caught traveling in the opposite direction. A sting operation is designed to nab suspects who attempt to purchase narcotics. Officers respond to a shoplifting call at a local thrift store.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: The owner of a truck discovers what happens when you don’t lock your door. Police level with a troubled man and implore him to make better choices. An officer acts as a therapist for multiple people and their relationships.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Deputies assist an injured woman who vows revenge on her male attackers. A woman tells deputies her husband beat her in front of their children. Officers protect an elderly woman from an abusive child.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A motorcycle with no license plate crashes while fleeing from Deputies. A woman driving a car with no windshield blames her ex-boyfriend. A gun is found hidden in a seat during a traffic stop.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Tinted car windows draw suspicion from a roaming patrol, a concerned friend gets a punch in the nose, and a traffic stop leads police a meth pipe in an odd place.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Police deploy spike strips to curb a stolen vehicle, a parolee at large speeds away with a two-month-old in the car, and officers try to determine the details of a stabbing.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Police question the legitimacy of the name a driver gives them. Both husband and wife protect each other in a case of domestic violence. A 12-year friendship is jeopardized when a woman suspects her roommate of stealing.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A jaywalking citation escalates to resisting arrest, an SUV contains more needles than one officer is willing to deal with, and a lovers' spat draws the attention of a patrol.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A suspect wanted for brandishing a knife squares up with Officers. A passenger learns the hard way that a friend offered him a ride in a stolen Jeep. A young driver is caught with magic mushrooms.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: An evasive driver blames his girlfriend for his behavior, a pregnant woman makes some questionable choices, and a robbery suspect finds comfort in coming clean.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers engage in a high-speed chase with a motorcycle going 100mph. A Florida man becomes verbally abusive with a woman and her mother. Police arrest a man who is pulled over for expired tags and end up seizing a rifle and 20 rounds of ammo.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Solving the case of a wealthy defense attorney killed at her son's wedding is compromised when all of the evidence is stolen along with Nick's car.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: The evidence in the case of a high-stakes gambler and ladies man murdered outside a casino after a night of revelry proves that appearances can be deceiving.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: A man accused of murdering his wife and co-workers leads the CSIs on a wild chase through a busy Vegas casino.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: The CSI team rallies around one of their own, who is shot in the line of duty and may not survive on the sixth season finale.

programme.title: Chocolate
programme.desc: Johnny Depp y Juliette Binoche protagonizan esta comedia romántica dulce y sexi que enamoró al público y obtuvo cinco nominaciones al Óscar, incluida la de Mejor Película, y que se centra en una chocolatería de un pequeño pueblo francés.

programme.title: ¿Bailamos?
programme.desc: John Clark es un adicto al trabajo dócil que se siente atrapado en una existencia aburrida y soporífera. Una noche, su vida cambia tras ver a una hermosa instructora de danza que lo inspira a salirse de sus esquemas y aprender pasos elaborados.

programme.title: Ghost: la sombra del amor
programme.desc: Patrick Swayze encarna a un fantasma que se alía con una psíquica (Whoopi Goldberg) para desenmascarar la verdad detrás de su asesinato y rescatar a su amor (Demi Moore) de un destino similar.

programme.title: Ni Idea (Clueless)
programme.desc: El mundo de Cher se desenmaraña cuando aparecen dos galanes: un compañero de clase sexy, y su simple pero lindo ex hermanastro. Ahora se da cuenta de que cuando se trata de amor, no tiene ni idea.

programme.title: Un despertar glorioso
programme.desc: Un presentador de la vieja escuela renuncia a su programa de noticias de mucho tiempo debido a las costumbres nuevas. Es reclutado por un productor estrella que quiere revivir un programa matutino endeble.

programme.title: 40 días y 40 noches
programme.desc: Después de una ruptura amorosa y una serie de conquistas insatisfactorias, un hombre hace una promesa de no tener relaciones sexuales durante 40 días y 40 noches. Josh Hartnett y Shannyn Sossamon protagonizan esta sátira.

programme.title: Alfie, el seductor irresistible
programme.desc: Cuando las consecuencias de su estilo de vida afectan a la mujer que ama y a su mejor amigo (Omar Epps), Alfie comienza a preguntarse si hay cosas más importantes que estos romances pasajeros. De ser así, ¿de qué se trata?

programme.title: Pistolas De Oro
programme.desc: Un hombre conocido como "Pistolas de Oro" tiene la costumbre de disparar a la gente en defensa propia. Cuando recibe un disparo, visita a un sacerdote que atiende sus heridas y le aconseja que cambie su vida.

programme.title: ¿Por qué nací mujer?
programme.desc: Una familia se reúne para festejar el día de las madres. Ante tantos problemas, una mujer hablará lo que no ha dicho por años. Esposo, hijos y nietos escucharán su cansancio y agobio silenciado por la sumisión y la obediencia impuestas.

programme.title: Romance sobre ruedas
programme.desc: Dos obreros logran ganar un concurso en el cual el premio es un auto último modelo. Le dan el nombre de 'Satán' y prometen compartirlo y utilizarlo al máximo de su potencial.

programme.title: Pies de Gato
programme.desc: Luis Aguilar encabeza el elenco en esta historia de una banda de bandidos alegres cuyas hazañas son más divertidas que despreciables. Continuación de "Los bandidos de Río Frío" (1954).

programme.title: El regreso de los siete magnificos
programme.desc: Protagonizada por Yul Brynner y con un reparto estelar que incluye a Robert Fuller, Warren Oates y Claude Akins, este western de aventuras sigue a los siete magníficos hasta México, donde se enfrentarán al duelo de sus vidas.

programme.title: La más grande historia jamás contada
programme.desc: La vida de Jesús en la Palestina ocupada por Roma: su nacimiento en Belén, su infancia en Nazaret, la última cena, la traición de su discípulo Judas, su juicio, crucifixión y posterior resurrección.

programme.title: El escritor fantasma
programme.desc: El cineasta Roman Polanski eleva la tensión en este thriller sobre un escritor (Ewan McGregor) encargado de redactar las vivencias de un ex primer ministro (Pierce Brosnan).

programme.title: Knock knock: seducción fatal
programme.desc: El gesto amable de un hombre de familia (Keanu Reeves) se convierte en una peligrosa seducción y el juego mortal del gato y el ratón cuando les abre la puerta a dos desamparadas jovencitas.

programme.title: 13 ASESINOS
programme.desc: Un ingenuo joven adopta la identidad de un hombre muerto para unirse a un juego de mafiosos de ruleta rusa. Con Mickey Rourke, Jason Statham y Michael Shannon.

programme.title: Atracción fatal
programme.desc: Michael Douglas interpreta a Dan, un abogado neoyorquino quien tiene un encuentro amoroso con la seductora Alex Forrest cuando su esposa no está. Dan luego termina el amorío por considerarlo un error, pero Alex no quiere ser ignorada...

programme.title: Inolvidable
programme.desc: David Krane (Ray Liotta), acusado del asesinato de su esposa en un ataque de ira ciega y alcohólica, toma una droga experimental y se embarca en una increíble búsqueda de la verdad…

programme.title: El ojo del observador
programme.desc: Un detective privado sigue discretamente a una asesina en serie por todo Estados Unidos. La persecución toma un giro inesperado cuando él termina obsesionandose de ella.

programme.title: Minority Report: sentencia previa
programme.desc: Minority Report es sobre un policía del futuro que trabaja en una división del departamento de policía arrestando asesinos antes de que cometan crímenes, gracias a una avanzada tecnología de premoniciones.

programme.title: Gladiador
programme.desc: Traicionado por el imperio, un general romano cae en la esclavitud y se alza como gladiador para vengar a su familia. Dirigida por Ridley Scott y protagonizada por Russell Crowe, ganó 5 premios Oscar, incluido a mejor película.

programme.title: El vuelo
programme.desc: Un piloto logra evitar que un vuelo se estrelle, pero la investigación del fallo revela algo inquietante.

programme.title: Vuelo nocturno
programme.desc: Al poco tiempo de despegar, el compañero de asiento de Lisa, Jackson, le revela la verdadera razón de su presencia. Forma parte de un plan para asesinar a un empresario rico y poderoso...y Lisa es la clave para lograrlo.

programme.title: El tren de la muerte
programme.desc: Jon Voight y Eric Roberts interpretan a un par de presos que en su fuga suben a un tren de mercancías, pero cuando el maquinista muere de un ataque al corazón, se encuentran atrapados, solos y a toda velocidad hacia un desastre seguro.

programme.title: Gladiador
programme.desc: Traicionado por el imperio, un general romano cae en la esclavitud y se alza como gladiador para vengar a su familia. Dirigida por Ridley Scott y protagonizada por Russell Crowe, ganó 5 premios Oscar, incluido a mejor película.

programme.title: Crank 2: alto voltage
programme.desc: En esta secuela explosiva, el sicario Chev Chelios (Stratham), se lanza en una persecución electrizante por las calles de Los Angeles, en busca del mafioso chino que le ha robado su casi indestructible corazón.

programme.title: La competencia
programme.desc: Una competencia de 24 horas a matar o morir se desarrolla en una ciudad inglesa. El ganador podrá reclamar un premio de diez millones en efectivo.

programme.title: En el juego del asesino
programme.desc: Un detective corre contra-reloj para mantenerse un paso adelante del asesino serial, que dirige ataques mortales desde prisión. Henry Cavill y Ben Kingsley son los protagonistas de esta película llena de acción que no dejará de sorprenderte.

programme.title: Crank 2: alto voltage
programme.desc: En esta secuela explosiva, el sicario Chev Chelios (Stratham), se lanza en una persecución electrizante por las calles de Los Angeles, en busca del mafioso chino que le ha robado su casi indestructible corazón.

programme.title: Especialista
programme.desc: In this action-packed thriller, Jason Statham is a mechanic—an elite assassin wa strict code and unique talent for cleanly eliminating targets. Simon West (CON AIR) directs this hit remake of the 1972 Charles Bronson movie.

programme.title: Venganza
programme.desc: Durante su permiso de libertad provisional, un convicto logra escapar de los guardias y planea su venganza contra aquellos que lo convirtieron en un asesino a sangre fría.

programme.title: Rambo: Primera Sangre
programme.desc: El veterano de la guerra de Vietnam, John J. Rambo, vaga a una pequeña ciudad de Washington en busca de su viejo amigo, pero se encuentra con la intolerancia y brutalidad del aguacil, Will Teasle.

programme.title: Azul extremo 2: El arrecife
programme.desc: Una pareja de europeos de clase alta (David Anders y Marsha Thomason) contrata a Sebastian (Chris Carmack), un buceador profesional, y a su novia aspirante a cazatesoros (Laura Vandervoort) para recuperar un tesoro hundido.

programme.title: La guerra de los mundos
programme.desc: Una narrativa contemporánea del clásico H.G.Wells, esta historia de suspenso y ciencia ficción revela la extraordinaria lucha por el futuro de la humanidad a través de los ojos de una familia americana.

programme.title: Inmersión letal
programme.desc: Paul Walker y Jessica Alba esperan pasar unos momentos inolvidables buceando, pero se meten en un lío con un traficante cuando encuentran la carga ilícita de un avión hundido en este thriller submarino lleno de acción y sorpresas.

programme.title: Azul extremo 2: El arrecife
programme.desc: Una pareja de europeos de clase alta (David Anders y Marsha Thomason) contrata a Sebastian (Chris Carmack), un buceador profesional, y a su novia aspirante a cazatesoros (Laura Vandervoort) para recuperar un tesoro hundido.

programme.title: La guerra de los mundos
programme.desc: Una narrativa contemporánea del clásico H.G.Wells, esta historia de suspenso y ciencia ficción revela la extraordinaria lucha por el futuro de la humanidad a través de los ojos de una familia americana.

programme.title: Rugrats la película: aventuras en pañales
programme.desc: Con el nacimiento de su nuevo hermano Dylan, Tommy Pickles sabía que las cosas iban a cambiar, pero nunca esperó que ser un hermano pudiera ser tal aventura.

programme.title: Sherlock Gnomes
programme.desc: ¡Únete a una aventura fe-gnome-nal en el mundo secreto de los gnomos de jardín! Cuando Gnomeo y Julieta descubren que sus amigos han desaparecido, junto al detective SHERLOCK GNOMES, resuelven el misterio y traen a los gnomos a casa.

programme.title: Un Ratoncito Duro De Cazar
programme.desc: Los dos hermanos sin suerte Lars y Ernie Smuntz no aprecian la vieja mansión en ruinas que heredaron, hasta que descubren que la propiedad vale millones.

programme.title: Fútbol Kung Fu
programme.desc: En esta risueña y llamativa comedia, un equipo de inadaptados se esfuerza por ganar un campeonato mezclando artes marciales con fútbol. Utilizando un juego poco ortodoxo, se enfrentan al temido equipo malo en la batalla final por el título.

programme.title: El periodista, la leyenda de Ron Burgundy
programme.desc: En el mundo de los noticieros de los setenta, Ron Burgundy y su equipo son los líderes en San Diego. Todo marcha muy bien para los chicos hasta que ​la reportera estrella Veronica Corningstone llega para cambiar las cosas

programme.title: Un Ratoncito Duro De Cazar
programme.desc: Los dos hermanos sin suerte Lars y Ernie Smuntz no aprecian la vieja mansión en ruinas que heredaron, hasta que descubren que la propiedad vale millones.

programme.title: Nacho Libre
programme.desc: Jack Black encarna el papel más gracioso como Ignacio, un cocinero de monasterio que alimenta huérfanos de día y por las noches se transforma en Nacho Libre, un notorio luchador en calzas.

programme.title: Superstar
programme.desc: Todo lo que Mary Katherine Gallagher quiere en la vida es un beso. No cualquier beso, un beso estilo Hollywood. Pero no importa cuánto lo intenta, nadie la quiere besar. Decide que para conseguir el beso, debe verse como salida de una película.

programme.title: Un elefante llamado Vera
programme.desc: Bill Murray y Janeane Garafalo protagonizan está loca comedia sobre un hombre al que la vida le cambia para siempre cuando hereda un elefante de circo.

programme.title: GAMBIT (CBS FILMS)
programme.desc: Harry Deane (Colin Firth) is a man with a plan. Art Curator for media tycoon, Lord Lionel Shabandar (Alan Rickman), Harry devises an elaborate plot to con his abusive boss into purchasing a fake Monet painting.

programme.title: Ladron Que Roba a Ladron (LAS)
programme.desc: Un par de ladrones profesionales hallan complicado su plan para robar a un millonario después de que los miembros hábiles del equipo regular rechazan el plan. Los ladrones se verán forzados a contratar a novatos para completar el trabajo.

programme.title: Ladrones
programme.desc: Fernando Colunga y Eduardo Yáñez lideran las risas como los Robin Hoods modernos en esta tremendamente entretenida secuela del gran éxito "Ladrón que roba a ladrón".

programme.title: Ya veremos
programme.desc: Los padres de Santi están divorciados, y él está acostumbrado a vivir con ellos pero por separado. Tras una urgente cirugía para salvar su vista, Santi decide hacer una lista de deseos por cumplir pero con sus padres unidos.

programme.title: Ladron Que Roba a Ladron (LAS)
programme.desc: Un par de ladrones profesionales hallan complicado su plan para robar a un millonario después de que los miembros hábiles del equipo regular rechazan el plan. Los ladrones se verán forzados a contratar a novatos para completar el trabajo.

programme.title: Ladrones
programme.desc: Fernando Colunga y Eduardo Yáñez lideran las risas como los Robin Hoods modernos en esta tremendamente entretenida secuela del gran éxito "Ladrón que roba a ladrón".

programme.title: Aqui Entre Nos (LAS)
programme.desc: Cansado de ser dado por sentado por su esposa y sus 3 hijas, Rodolfo Guerra se levanta una mañana y decide no ir a trabajar. Entonces comienza la locura.

programme.title: El cuento de las comadrejas
programme.desc: Una actriz de la era dorada del cine argentino comparte una mansión en decadencia con tres hombres: su esposo, un guionista y un director con los que solía trabajar. Pero la llegada de dos jóvenes y la posible venta de la mansión lo cambian todo.

programme.title: Cazador de demonios
programme.desc: Un maldito pistolero (Wesley Snipes) cuyas víctimas regresan de entre los muertos, recluta a un joven guerrero para ayudar en la lucha contra una banda de zombies.

programme.title: Drácula 2000
programme.desc: El maestro del terror Wes Craven presenta una adaptación moderna y sexy del clásico thriller gótico. Luego de que Drácula despierta de su sueño de 100 años, su primer destino es Estados Unidos y la exótica ciudad de Nueva Orleans.

programme.title: El último exorcismo: Parte II
programme.desc: Nell está de nuevo en la seguridad de la civilización y es enviada a vivir en una casa de acogida, donde se la anima a dejar atrás su pasado e iniciar una nueva vida.

programme.title: Día de la madre
programme.desc: Rebecca DeMornay brinda una interpretación aterradora en este baño de sangre brutal. Cuando sus hijos entran a una casa y toman como rehenes a los dueños; ella les enseña cómo es la verdadera tortura. Coprotagonizada por Shawn Ashmore.

programme.title: Los niños del maíz II: el sacrificio final.
programme.desc: La película exitosa basada en un cuento de Stephen King regresa con todo el asombro y el terror rural. Esta secuela tenebrosa muestra miembros en una ciudad cercana en Nebraska que adoptan a los adolescentes sobrevivientes de la película anterior.

programme.title: Fuego en el cielo
programme.desc: En 1975, el leñador Travis Walteron y sus compañeros de trabajo descubrieron un ovni sobrevolando. Los amigos de Walton huyeron, pero Walton no tuvo tanta fortuna. Tras su abducción a la extraña nave, es sometido a un estudio médico doloroso.

programme.title: Once Upon a Time in the West
programme.desc: The epic story of a mysterious stranger with a harmonica who joins forces with a notorious desperado to protect a beautiful widow from a ruthless assassin working for the railroad.

programme.title: Hang 'Em High
programme.desc: Clint Eastwood stars in this brazen tale about a rampaging band of vigilantes who make two mistakes: they hang the wrong man and they don't finish the job. Inger Stevens, Pat Hingle, Bruce Dern & Dennis Hopper co-star in this action-packed western.

programme.title: Valdez Is Coming
programme.desc: In this rousing Western, when a greedy rancher causes the death of an innocent man, former sheriff Bob Valdez (Burt Lancaster) orders him to provide financial support for the widow. But when he refuses, Valdez vows to exact justice at any cost!

programme.title: Sons Of New Mexico
programme.desc: Gene Autry becomes the guardian of a wayward boy who is in debt. Gene sends him to the New Mexico Military Institute, where he falls in with bad companions and is framed for a murder of an ex-jockey.

programme.title: The Big Sombrero
programme.desc: Gene heads South in a fiesta of melody and a jamboree of romance. He fights for the right of rancheros to live on their rancho. Outlaws fear him and senoritas cheer him, and his famous horse Champion.

programme.title: The Cowboy And The Indians
programme.desc: Gene Autry runs in to opposition when he tries to aid starving Navajos. The Chief is found unconscious and his necklace gone. Lakohna, the successor, is blamed. Gene and Lakohna join to seek justice.

programme.title: Geronimo
programme.desc: In 1883, Geronimo and his small group of Apache warriors, under constant attack from both U.S. and Mexican military forces, reluctantly surrender in exchange for food and land. But promises are broken, and the Apaches declare all-out war on the U.S.

programme.title: Sands of Iwo Jima
programme.desc: Tough-as-nails career Marine Sergeant John Stryker is greatly disliked by the men of his squad, particularly the combat replacements, for the rigorous training he puts them through.

programme.title: The Quiet Man
programme.desc: An American ex-boxer returns to Ireland to win the hand of a spirited young woman. He is confronted by local customs and the woman's belligerent brother. Set in the verdant Irish countryside, this film has beautiful scenery and local charm.

programme.title: The Misfits
programme.desc: In their final screen performances, Clark Gable and Marilyn Monroe are at their luminous best as an aging cowboy and a disillusioned divorcee, each trying to adapt to new ways of life in John Huston's piercing classic. Montgomery Clift also stars.

programme.title: Stella Dallas
programme.desc: A working-class woman is willing to do whatever it takes to give her daughter a socially promising future.

programme.title: City Lights
programme.desc: With the aid of a wealthy erratic tippler, a dewy-eyed tramp who has fallen in love with a sightless flower girl accumulates money to be able to help her medically.

programme.title: The Great Dictator
programme.desc: Dictator Adenoid Hynkel tries to expand his empire while a poor Jewish barber tries to avoid persecution from Hynkel's regime.

programme.title: Gomer Pyle, U.S.M.C.
programme.desc: A visiting Congressman suggests a promotion for Gomer, and Carter nearly loses his stripes training Gomer to take command.

programme.title: Gomer Pyle, U.S.M.C.
programme.desc: Gomer's dreams keep coming true, and his latest has Carter proposing to Bunny.

programme.title: Green Acres
programme.desc: Oliver takes Lisa along to an agricultural convention. There, Lisa bonds with an ex-gangster couple, who insist upon teaching the Douglas's some of their shortcuts to successful farming. It turns out to be an offer that Oliver can not refuse.

programme.title: Green Acres
programme.desc: Oliver champions agri-tech as a way to increase productivity on the farm, but when a computer gives its assessment of the Douglas' marriage, Lisa (Eva Gabor) begins to question her union with Oliver. It's bits versus bytes in Green Acres!

programme.title: Green Acres
programme.desc: Determined to teach his spendthrift wife Lisa how to save money, Oliver insists that she learn about farming...by growing her own vegetables! In her own inimitable fashion, armed with useless pamphlets from Mr. Kimball, Lisa sets to tilling!

programme.title: Green Acres
programme.desc: When handyman Eb (Tom Lester) reports he has seen little green men piloting flying saucers, everyone in Hooterville takes him at his word…even the Air Force…and soon the Douglas farm becomes the Roswell of the greater Pixley area!

programme.title: Green Acres
programme.desc: Ralph (Mary Grace Canfield) is distraught when her beloved Mr. Kimball, is fired as the county agricultural agent. Out of a job, Kimball (Alvy Moore) no longer has money enough to marry the lady-carpenter-in-waiting! But wait…did he even want to?

programme.title: Green Acres
programme.desc: Lisa weaves the tale of her great, great grandmother, the Queen of the Gypsies, to explain a bizarre family tradition: a woman in her family must marry an American -- but only every fourth generation -- in order to gain a special inheritance.

programme.title: Green Acres
programme.desc: After Oliver (Eddie Albert) accidentally drops a hammer on her head, Lisa (Eva Gabor) develops a case of amnesia, with no idea who she is or why she is on a farm in Hooterville…and she adamantly refuses to believe that Oliver is her husband!

programme.title: Green Acres
programme.desc: Nothing gets done on the Douglas farm when Oliver (Eddie Albert) gifts Eb (Tom Lester) a top-of-the-line radio for his birthday. Letting nothing stop him, Eb (Tom Lester) enters a radio contest...even when Eleanor the cow swallows the radio whole.

programme.title: Green Acres
programme.desc: Lisa (Eva Gabor) is delighted to learn that her Hungarian mother is planning a visit to their little farm. Much to Oliver's (Eddie Albert) disbelief and dismay, a rumor spreads all around Hooterville that Lisa's mother is a European countess.

programme.title: All in the Family
programme.desc: A computer error leads Edith into collecting a small fortune in quarters sent to her in the mail by a prune company. When Archie discovers this, he immediately wants to keep the money and doesn't want Edith to say anything to the company.

programme.title: All in the Family
programme.desc: Mike is all excited when the Lorenzos and Lionel are coming over after dinner for a game of 'Group Therapy.' Archie takes one look at some of the questions that are asked during a game and quickly rushes off for drinks at Kelsey's bar.

programme.title: The Odd Couple
programme.desc: Felix develops a severe case of insomnia and Oscar tries to help his roommate.

programme.title: The Odd Couple

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En las zonas rurales de Canadá, el Dr. John Schneeberger es acusado de sedar y agredir sexualmente a una de sus pacientes y a su hijastra. Las pruebas de ADN demuestran que el doctor es inocente, pero la paciente insiste en que la sedó y violó.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En 1971, John List dejó una nota con los cuerpos de su madre, esposa y tres hijos en el salón de baile de su mansión antes de desaparecer por completo. Los detectives deben resolver el caso, a pesar de tener solo una fotografía desactualizada de List.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Rompiendo el Molde
programme.desc: El hijo de tres años de unos padres de Dripping Springs, Texas, desarrolla una condición respiratoria.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En la víspera de Navidad de 2005, se encuentra el cuerpo de un hombre ardiendo cerca de Baltimore. Finalmente fue identificado como Wesley Person, de 26 años.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En 1990, el cuerpo de Shirley Andronowich fue encontrado mutilado. Los testigos le dijeron a la policía que tuvo una pelea con su esposo la noche anterior, pero la evidencia forense demostró que él no tuvo nada que ver con su muerte.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Los jóvenes navajos del suroeste estaban muriendo a un ritmo alarmante. Los curanderos de la tribu proporcionaron a los investigadores una pista fundamental que llevaría al otro lado del mundo al asesino más improbable.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Cuando una mujer desaparece, los amigos y familia se proponen encontrarla. Sus peores miedos se confirman semanas después cuando se descubre su cuerpo.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Un rastro de un asesinato se esfuma, hasta que la policía recibe un llamado de una mujer cuyo esposo, Gerald Powers, tenía un pasado criminal y una afición por los Chevy Berettas.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Dentro de un cabello
programme.desc: Una mirada retrospectiva al caso del violador de River Park, que asaltó a cuatro mujeres en South Bend, Indiana, durante 1996. Los agentes del orden arrestaron a Richard Alexander, quien fue declarado culpable en 1998 y sentenciado a 70 años de prisión.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Después de una Convención de Filadelfia, 180 legionarios contraen síntomas similares a la neumonía y 29 de ellos mueren. La determinación de un científico ayuda a identificar la causa de esta enfermedad mortal.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: No había una razón clara para que un joven y saludable estudiante universitario estuviera muerto. Pero cuando el forense descubrió una pequeña pista durante la autopsia, los investigadores pudieron descubrir un misterio lleno de traición y venganza.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Crimen limpio
programme.desc: Una empleada de una tintorería fue violada y asesinada en la tienda. La policía recurrió a la ciencia forense en busca de las respuestas que necesitaban.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Después de inspeccionar el daño de una tormenta en un hogar en Tampa, un asesor de seguros simplemente desapareció. Treinta horas después, su cuerpo apareció en un río cercano. Pero el asesino había sido descuidado.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Una joven pareja decidió celebrar su primer aniversario de bodas con un viaje de campamento a Mount Hood.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Una investigación sobre la muerte de un veterano de la Segunda Guerra Mundial se detuvo por completo cuando el sospechoso principal tenía una cortada sólida.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Enamorado mortal
programme.desc: Un obstetra regresó a casa del hospital y encontró a su esposa en el piso del baño. Estaba cubierta de sangre y no respiraba.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En una trágica jugada del destino, pocos días después de que la mujer vendiera su casa y se mudara a un modesto remolque, un incendio se llevó tanto el remolque como su vida. Pero la autopsia demostró que no fue un accidente.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: El infiel
programme.desc: Walter Notheis, Jr. era mejor conocido al público Americano como el entretenedor, Walter Scott, vocalista principal de la banda, Bob Kuban and the In-Men. Walter no sabía que la canción sería una premonición de los eventos que llevarían a su muerte.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: Cowboys Stadium in Arlington, Texas is once again the venue for the Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders auditions.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: Tensions run high for the 69 new girls as the 18 returning DCC veterans join the competition for a coveted invitation to training camp.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: DCC Training Camp begins tonight at Valley Ranch! The stress for the newly selected training camp candidates is evident as they struggle to re-arrange their schedules and secure new living arrangements in Dallas.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: It's two weeks into training camp, and Kelli and Judy are fixing to make their first cuts. This week's rehearsals are important for all the girls as they are expected to master the world-famous DCC kick line and jump split.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: It's week three of training camp and the rookie candidates are brought in for their DCC "Makeovers." They're given a new look with a hair and make-up revamp and are transformed in the DCC mold.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: Tonight's rehearsal starts with a big bang when DCC Technical Director Kitty Carter makes a surprise visit to Valley Ranch.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: It's a tense time for all and Training Camp Candidates who are not DCC ready will be exposed at the first and only field rehearsal on the Cowboys Stadium turf.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: It has all come down to the final night of training camp. Tonight, dreams will be made or broken.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: In this two-hour season premiere of Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team, 600 hopeful candidates arrive at Cowboys Stadium for the Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders preliminary auditions.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: Training Camp opens and many of the new candidates have had to uproot their lives and move to Dallas with no guarantee of making it through Training Camp to become a Dallas Cowboy Cheerleader.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: It is just the second week of rehearsals and Kelli and Judy are quick to run the Training Camp Candidates through the signature kick line and jump split.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: In week three of training camp, the rookie candidates are brought in for their DCC makeover. Under the scrutiny of Kelli Finglass, new hairstyles and makeup applications give the girls the DCC look.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: It's week five of training camp and Kelli is out sick. DCC Technical Director, Kitty Carter, fills in and runs the first rehearsal of the week.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: Week 7 of training camp begins with a rehearsal on the field at Cowboys Stadium. Kelli and Judy are ready to make final cuts and tonight's rehearsal could determine who makes the squad.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: It's time to announce the DCC squad but first Kelli and Judy put the candidates through a final field rehearsal at Cowboys Stadium. Tensions run high among the girls as Kelli and Judy watch their every step.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: The squad has their first game day performance behind them, but after a bad rehearsal, Kelli warns her new team she will cut girls if they don't give 110 percent.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: The Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders take a break from the sidelines and travel to Mexico for their annual swimsuit calendar photo shoot.

programme.title: Dateline NBC
programme.desc: A successful businesswoman and mother of three is found shot in her office; the investigation into her death leaves a family divided.

programme.title: Dateline NBC
programme.desc: Firefighters make a grisly discovery while responding to a house fire in a Toronto suburb; as a family searches for answers, investigators launch an elaborate undercover sting that reveals a devious murder-for-hire plot and the ultimate betrayal.

programme.title: Dateline NBC
programme.desc: Investigators look for answers when a popular school superintendent is found dead in his western New York home.

programme.title: Dateline NBC
programme.desc: Months after a woman and her husband come down with the same mysterious illness, the woman dies after experiencing the same symptoms; old recordings reveal the twisted truth about her demise.

programme.title: Dateline NBC
programme.desc: A Nebraska family's parents are murdered following the clan's Easter celebration.

programme.title: Dateline NBC
programme.desc: The investigation into the death of a pregnant woman just months after she wed her high school sweetheart reveals secret lives and feuds.

programme.title: Dateline NBC
programme.desc: Kathleen Schroll makes a phone call right before her death where she identifies her killer, which leads to an arrest. Two trials and 12 years later, authorities begin to wonder who was really the victim.

programme.title: Dateline NBC
programme.desc: A successful businesswoman and mother of three is found shot in her office; the investigation into her death leaves a family divided.

programme.title: Dateline NBC
programme.desc: Two decades after a woman falls to her death, police reopen the case and arrest her husband.

programme.title: Dateline NBC
programme.desc: Robert Davis, who was convicted of murdering a woman and her son, claims his confession was coerced and tries to prove he is innocent.

programme.title: Dateline NBC
programme.desc: A nurse is gunned down in her home and detectives believe they have a clear suspect; as they delve deeper into the investigation new information leads them down a completely different path.

programme.title: Dateline NBC
programme.desc: After a 15-year-old girl disappears, investigators discover a creek where the local teenagers hang out that may hold the answer to her disappearance.

programme.title: Dateline NBC
programme.desc: The disappearance of a young woman from Bend, Ore., leads to an intense manhunt after the suspect embarks on a two state crime spree.

programme.title: Rock of Love: Meet the Parents
programme.desc: Only three girls are left in the house and now it's time for their parents to meet Bret.

programme.title: Rock of Love: The Rose & the Thorn
programme.desc: Things heat up when Bret tells the final 2 girls to pack their bikinis ‘cause they're goin' for an exotic getaway to Cabo San Lucas, Mexico!

programme.title: Rock of Love: Clip Show
programme.desc: In this 30 minute special episode, Bret hosts a look back at hilarious, never-before-seen moments with our favorite girls from the series.

programme.title: Rock of Love: Reunion
programme.desc: Bret has gathered all of his ladies for one more wild night while two of the girls reveal that they moved in together and share the same bed.

programme.title: Flavor of Love: Fifteen Beds and a Bucket of Puke
programme.desc: Flavor Flav welcomes 20 women to his macadocious mansion with the hope of finding the next great love of his life.

programme.title: Flavor of Love: Rub a Dub Flav
programme.desc: Flavor Flav challenges his remaining fifteen Flavorettes to a never before attempted hot tub speed dating competition.

programme.title: Flavor of Love: A Friend of Flav's is a Friend of Mine
programme.desc: Ten girls are left and the competition is getting stiff. Flav divides the girls into groups of five and presents them with two challenges.

programme.title: Flavor of Love: The Flavor of Chicken
programme.desc: Flavor Flav has a special surprise for his eight remaining ladies. His “moms”, Anna Drayton has come to visit.

programme.title: Flavor of Love: What Happens in Flavor Stays in Flavor
programme.desc: Flavor Flav is a good luck person. So he needs a good luck woman. To test the girls on this trait, he flies the seven remaining women to Vegas on his private jet.

programme.title: Flavor of Love: InterroGitted
programme.desc: There's six girls left so Flav brings out the big guns. He flies Brigitte Neilsen into town to get to know the girls a little better.

programme.title: Flavor of Love: Flav's Trippin
programme.desc: Flav takes two of the young ladies to Palm Springs for a spa retreat where things get muddy, wet and crazy.

programme.title: Flavor of Love: Family Flavors
programme.desc: Three girls are left! Things are getting serious so Flav decides it's time to meet the ladies' parents.

programme.title: Flavor of Love: The Slaps, Smacks, Screams and Spit You Never Saw
programme.desc: A lot of crazy stuff has happened in Flav's house since the girls arrived.

programme.title: Flavor of Love: Viva La Flav
programme.desc: The final two girls remain. To celebrate having made it this far, Flav takes the two girls to Puerto Vallarta for an exotic three day Mexican getaway.

programme.desc: With 26 sealed briefcases full of varying amounts of cash, ranging from a penny to $1m – contestants decide whether to accept an offer of cash from ‘the Banker,’ in exchange for what might be contained in the contestant’s chosen briefcase.

programme.desc: With 26 sealed briefcases full of varying amounts of cash, ranging from a penny to $1m – contestants decide whether to accept an offer of cash from ‘the Banker,’ in exchange for what might be contained in the contestant’s chosen briefcase.

programme.title: Deal or No Deal
programme.desc: The contestant picks one case which is theirs to keep. As each of the 25 cases is opened, the likelihood of the player having a valuable cash amount in their case decreases or increases, with ‘the Banker’ tempting the player throughout the game.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: After a stressful audition, Maya tosses her cello in the trash, and decides to have more fun. The competition between Drew and Clare intensifies. Connor offers Eli some advice about love.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: School's out and summer's in! A few lucky Degrassi students are bound for a once-in-a-lifetime trip to Paris, accompanied by some fresh new faces. And then there are others playing counselor at Degrassi Day Camp.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: School's out and summer's in! A few lucky Degrassi students are bound for a once-in-a-lifetime trip to Paris, accompanied by some fresh new faces. And then there are others playing counselor at Degrassi Day Camp.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Despite her illness, Clare is determined to remain a regular girl. Alli is lonely in Paris and tries to make the best of it without her BF and Tristan tries to 'bro' up while rooming with the guys.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Clare receives crushing news while waiting for her MRI results. Needing time away from the hospital, Clare convinces Drew to help her escape.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Why is Becky blowing Adam off to spend time with Todd? Who's Todd? Adam is not liking this long-distance relationship thing. Alli is falling hard for her Parisian waiter and worries maybe too hard too fast?

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Adam takes Dallas' advice and tries juggling two girls at once. But he's not that kind of guy. When upset Tristan goes AWOL in Paris, Maya enlists her sworn enemy for help find him and Alli continues to try and find balance in her relationships.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Leo and Alli are getting to feel really serious. Distraught Drew needs to visit camp for comfort. Maya must show up Zoë and puts an expensive dress on her mother's credit card… nothing could possibly go wrong, right? !

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: As summer comes to an end, Becky tries to understand the meaning behind an unexpected tragedy.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: After the devastating loss of Adam, the Degrassi students try their best to move on but when it's your brother… And fitting in is hard for Zoë because she's never just been a normal girl. Alli reunites with Leo on her home turf.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Drew does his best as Degrassi President but without sleep, he's not much good. By Drew's side, Zoë becomes the first lady of Degrassi. Leo does damage control and tries to get in with Alli's friends.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: The opportunity to write for a real-life magazine is offered to Clare but her brain after cancer is not cooperating.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Clare tries to concoct any excuse to save her reputation with the magazine but doesn’t want to play the cancer card.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Focusing more on her music than Miles, Maya lets Zoë talk her into making a sexy music video.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Miles helps Maya discover who is behind her video going viral. Maya's hellbent on revenge, getting her into hot water.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Student council prez Drew is psyched about his Degrassi TV interview but when the story sheds a negative light, Drew’s stunned.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Drew is excited to have Bianca back in town for Thanksgiving but is surprised when she isn't as forthcoming as he expected.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: It’s Alli’s birthday, but all she can think about is Leo being sent back to France.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Alli is still lying to protect Leo, but her stories are beginning to unravel. Maya shows her rubber room classmates that she isn’t a princess.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Drew attempts juggling his new job and his new girl. To forget about Leo, Alli focusses on her science experiment. After getting thrown out of class for forgetting to wear a bra, Imogen plans a scathing piece for Degrassi TV.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Failing at balancing his life, Drew decides he has to break up with Zoë. Alli partners up with Dallas in an attempt to stay focused on her science experiment. Imogen takes her dress code fight online, but what does she really want to achieve?

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: A shocking discovery leads Miles to question his family life. Eli is slipping away, and Clare finds herself growing closer to Drew. Dallas wants to be with Alli, but the truth about her relationship with Leo could send him over the edge.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Miles is determined to out his father’s secrets, but he may not be ready for the whole truth.

programme.title: Degrassi Junior High
programme.desc: When, in response to Joey's ridicule, Dwayne challenges him to a fight, Joey feels he has to go through with it. Meanwhile, Stephanie finally realizes, after weeks of flirtation, that Simon is interested in Alexa, not her.

programme.title: Degrassi Junior High
programme.desc: When the Degrassi Jr. High quiz team goes to Kathleen's house to prepare for a match, they discover that Kathleen's mother is an alcoholic. Rich and Caitlin offer Kathleen their support.

programme.title: Degrassi Junior High
programme.desc: Sick of being confused with her twin sister Heather, Erica is determined to define herself as an individual. She finds an opportunity at the Spring Dance, where she is found passionately kissing a strange boy!

programme.title: Degrassi Junior High
programme.desc: As Stephanie's mother makes plans to remarry and her father continues to fight for custody of her and her brother, Stephanie becomes increasingly despondent. She even starts to talk about suicide.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Rick decides to get back at his bullies, hitting them right where it hurts – their cars. But when Jimmy becomes a member of the “Whack Your Brain” team, the two form a truce.

programme.desc: Alastair Sooke explores the sumptuous treasures of the Golden Age of Egyptian art, starting with troubling psychological portraits of tyrant king Senwosret III, and ending with the golden mask of boy-king Tutankhamun.

programme.title: Treasures of Ancient Egypt
programme.desc: From the statues of Rameses II to the final flourishes under Queen Cleopatra, Sooke discovers that the subsequent invasions by foreign rulers, from the Nubians and Alexander the Great to the Romans, produced a new hybrid art full of surprise.

programme.title: Secrets of the Pyramids
programme.desc: Exploring fresh archaeological excavations that shed new light on the lives of those who worked tirelessly on the pyramids.

programme.title: Animal Mummies
programme.desc: Exploring the world of pet preservation.

programme.title: Extinct: A Horizon Guide to Dinosaurs
programme.desc: From realising that lumbering swamp dwellers were really warm blooded killers, new finds, controversial theories and breakthrough technology have enabled scientists to rethink how dinosaurs lived and solve the mystery of their disappearance.

programme.title: Attenborough and the Giant Dinosaur
programme.desc: David Attenborough tells the story of the discovery and reconstruction in Argentina of the world's largest known dinosaur, a brand new species of titanosaur. Measuring 37m long, it now holds the record as the biggest animal ever to walk the earth.

programme.title: Walking with Dinosaurs
programme.desc: The life of the first reptilian carnivores on Earth, told through computer animation.

programme.title: Walking with Dinosaurs
programme.desc: The Jurassic period saw the advent of the largest and strongest dinosaurs that ever roamed the Earth.

programme.title: Walking with Dinosaurs
programme.desc: A look at the world as it was 149 million years ago - in the late Jurassic Period. The old continents have broken up and much of the land is under water. Huge shallow seas have supported a revolution in marine life.

programme.title: Walking with Dinosaurs
programme.desc: With wings longer than those of a small plane, pterosaurs were the largest creatures ever known to have flown.

programme.title: Walking with Dinosaurs
programme.desc: This programme looks at the Cretaceous period, 106 million years ago. Volcanic activity forces the continents apart, and dinosaurs diversify into a range of species to cope with environmental extremes.

programme.title: Walking with Dinosaurs
programme.desc: It is the late Cretaceous period and Tyrannosaurus rex is the top predator, but the Earth is poisoned by volcanic activity and a comet strikes.

programme.title: Tutankhamun: Life, Death and Legacy
programme.desc: Dan meets the mummies of Tutankhamun's parents at the Egyptian Museum in Cairo, and discovers that they were actually brother and sister. CT scans reveal how this incestuous relationship could have been responsible for Tutankhamun's poor health.

programme.title: Tutankhamun: Life, Death and Legacy
programme.desc: Picking up the story in 1323BC, the pharaoh sustains the injury that would eventually kill him. Dan investigates a scan of Tutankhamun's skeleton, while John visits Howard Carter's house and probes the 1920s craze of `Tutmania'.

programme.title: Touched By An Angel
programme.desc: Listening to a rebroadcast of the famous 1938 Halloween night radio presentation of The War of the Worlds brings back painful memories to both Monica and esteemed author Leonard Pound

programme.title: Touched By An Angel

programme.title: Touched By An Angel

programme.title: Touched By An Angel

programme.title: Dr. Quinn, Medicine Woman

programme.title: Dr. Quinn, Medicine Woman
programme.desc: Brian rescues a man from a trap who has horrific burns to his face from a train crash. Michaela decides to perform reconstructive surgery to repair his face.

programme.title: Invasion U.S.A.
programme.desc: An army of terrorist mercenaries led by Soviet agent Rostov catches America unprepared and makes it a war zone from sea to shining sea. Only one man can stem the rising tide of violence: retired agent and martial arts expert Matt Hunter.

programme.title: The Delta Force
programme.desc: Political extremists have taken innocent people hostage…and only super-soldiers Chuck Norris, Lee Marvin and The Delta Force can rescue them in this explosive adventure filled with wall-to-wall action! Martin Balsam and Shelley Winters also star.

programme.title: Delta Force 2: The Colombian Connection
programme.desc: Chuck Norris is in peak form in this explosive action/adventure that brings back one of his most unforgettable characters, Delta Force Colonel Scott McCoy, for a daring mission to destroy a deadly drug cartel led by the ruthless Billy Drago!

programme.title: Enter the Ninja
programme.desc: The absorbing martial arts film that exposes Ninjutsu, the lethal, little-known "Art of Invisibility"... which includes the use of hypnotism, explosives, and super-human fighting skills.

programme.title: Revenge of the Ninja
programme.desc: Sho Kosugi ("Enter the Ninja") delivers a heart-pounding display of strength, speed and lethal Ninja know-how in this action-packed thriller that takes us back to the good old days of the Kung Fu extravaganza.

programme.title: American Ninja
programme.desc: Michael Dudikoff stars as Joe Armstrong, a one-man fighting machine. Serving in the army to avoid prison, Joe finds himself battling the deadly Black Star Order, as well as corrupt military leaders in order to bring down an illegal arms sale.

programme.title: American Ninja 2: The Confrontation
programme.desc: On a remote Caribbean island, Army Ranger Joe Armstrong saves an old friend from the clutches of "The Lion," an evil super-criminal who has kidnapped a local scientist and mass-produced an army of mutant Ninja warriors.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A human skeleton was discovered in the North Carolina marshlands. When investigators learned she'd been dead for 18 months, they knew it would be difficult to find out who she was, let alone who killed her.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: They thought the fire would cover their crime. But one tiny clue, no bigger than a thumbtack, remained. It held all the information investigators needed to put a trio of cold-blooded killers behind bars.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When an off-duty policeman was shot dead, his fellow officers were determined to solve the crime. They needed clues to find the killer and they discovered them in tiny fibres and an asthma inhaler.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When a talented television news anchor is shot to death outside her home, it appears to be a crime of passion perpetrated by an obsessed fan.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A married couple decided to escape the cold of winter with a mini-vacation in Key West. The wife went missing and police searched every square inch of the island; they found nothing but a pair of sandals which might have belonged to her.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: After a street fight takes the life of a national wrestling champion, police must determine if he was killed in cold blood or in self-defense.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Tooth or Consequences
programme.desc: An investigation into the murder of Katie Poirier is stymied by the lack of a body. Finally, investigators use a single tooth found among some charred remains to identify her.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When a policeman's house goes up in flames, experts suspect arson. The officer whose home was torched arrests low-level drug dealer James Wren, who confesses. But when the suspect vanishes, investigators question the authenticity of the confession.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In this classic episode of Forensic Files, the longest-running true crime series in television history, Eileen and Derrick Severs disappear from their home in a small village in Great Britain and police find evidence of foul play.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Within Arm's Reach
programme.desc: A police officer accused of killing his estranged wife insists she committed suicide. Investigators say it was murder — that it was physically impossible for the woman to have shot herself.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In the 1980s, a trio of unsolved murders occurred in Wichita Falls, Texas. Later, a fourth murder from the same time period provided the police with far more than they realized.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1999, Patrick McRae was found dead in his Des Moines home and the crime scene was awash with blood. Analysis showed it had come from two people, one of whom was female.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A woman was found dead on the bedroom floor of her apartment. The crime scene yielded little of value and investigators wondered if they would find enough evidence to make a case, much less catch a killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A mysterious computer crash pushed a thriving manufacturing company to the brink of collapse, jeopardizing hundreds of employees' jobs. Forensic investigators must determine if the crash was the result of a computer defect, human error or sabotage.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: 6-year-old Nicole Rae Walker was killed in a hit-and-run in her Ft. Lauderdale neighborhood. The prosecutor combines the talents of an accident reconstruction expert with a video specialist to create a graphic demonstration of the moment of impact.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When a man is gunned down in his own garage, investigators use science to unravel a twisted tale of lust, greed and deception.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When Rosemary Anderson is found dead on the side of the road, her boyfriend becomes the prime suspect. He eventually confessed to her murder, but so did another man: serial killer Eric Edgar Cooke.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When a young woman disappeared, police feared she was the latest victim in a string of similar crimes. A pair of bloody gloves, unique tire tracks and ordinary pine needles provided investigators with some extraordinary clues.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When a woman went missing, friends and family were determined to find her. Their worst fears were confirmed weeks later when her body was discovered.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Investigators sift through the ashes of a fire which killed a 40-year-old woman. The fire appears to have been started by an unattended cigarette. On closer look, forensic scientists discover the cause was far more complicated.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When four-month-old Ryan Stallings dies under suspicious circumstances, his mother is ultimately convicted of his murder. But months later, new evidence emerges from a startling source — his newborn brother.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1989, the dead bodies of Joan Rogers and her two teenage daughters were found floating in Tampa Bay.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A Michigan State University grad student disappeared and was presumed dead. With the help of a professor of geological sciences, police hoped to get the "dirt" on her killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A young woman attends evening church services, then disappears. When her abandoned car is found, the tank is empty and a gas can she kept in her trunk for emergencies is missing.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 2007, Shamaia Smith disappears from a strip club in East Hartford, CT. Police consider various patrons of the club, but focus on local businessman Kenneth Otto.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Survivors of Nazi atrocities recognized Archbishop Trifa, former head of the Romanian Orthodox Church in America, as having directed a bloody attack against Jews during World War II. He was deported in 1984 and died three years later.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: An investigation into the murder of a World War II veteran slowed to a halt when the prime suspect had a solid alibi. But a lucky break led to a shady character who wore distinctive boots and had a sweet tooth.

programme.title: Modern Marvels

programme.title: Modern Marvels

programme.title: Modern Marvels
programme.desc: Precision-guided weapons become a flashpoint for war critics.

programme.title: Modern Marvels

programme.title: Modern Marvels
